hero.headline: Landscapes That Elevate Communities
hero.subheadline: For 16 years, North Georgia Landscape Management has transformed HOA communities, multi-family properties, and commercial campuses across Metro Atlanta. We deliver the kind of grounds care that makes residents proud and property values rise.
checkmarks: Full-service landscape solutions under one roof
Trusted by HOAs and property managers across North Georgia
Consistent crews with trained, accountable teams

services.headline: Complete Landscape Solutions
services.subtitle: From routine maintenance to full installations, we handle every aspect of your property's outdoor spaces.

cards.title: HOA Landscape Maintenance
cards.description: Year-round mowing, trimming, seasonal color, and grounds upkeep that keeps your community looking immaculate and HOA boards confident.

cards.title: HOA Installations & Enhancements
cards.description: New plantings, hardscapes, irrigation systems, and landscape upgrades designed to elevate curb appeal and community pride.

cards.title: Multi-Family Property Care
cards.description: Comprehensive grounds management for apartment complexes and multi-unit communities that retains tenants and impresses prospects.

cards.title: Commercial Landscape Services
cards.description: Reliable maintenance for office parks, retail centers, and business complexes with schedules you can count on every single week.

cards.title: Industrial Grounds Management
cards.description: Professional landscape care for industrial facilities and campuses, maintaining clean appearances while working around operational needs.

cards.title: Seasonal Color & Plantings
cards.description: Rotating seasonal flower beds, shrub installations, and mulch programs that keep properties vibrant and welcoming through every season.

steps.title: Schedule a Property Walk-Through
steps.description: We visit your property, assess its needs, and listen to your goals and concerns. No pressure, just honest recommendations.

steps.title: Receive Your Custom Proposal
steps.description: Within days, you'll get a detailed plan with clear pricing, scope of services, and a maintenance calendar tailored to your property.

steps.title: Watch Your Property Transform
steps.description: Our trained crews arrive on schedule, communicate proactively, and deliver results that make you proud to manage your property.

about.label: About NGLM
about.headline: Built on Integrity. Driven by Results.
about.description: Founded by Jeremy Talboy in 2010, North Georgia Landscape Management was born from the belief that landscapes do more than beautify — they shape how people feel, live, and connect. For over 16 years, we've served Metro Atlanta and North Georgia with a commitment to accountability, continuous improvement, and genuine partnership with every client we serve.

features.title: Trained & Accountable Crews
features.description: Every team member receives ongoing training and is held to the highest professional standards on every property visit.

features.title: One-Stop Landscape Partner
features.description: From weekly maintenance to full installations, we handle all your landscape needs under one roof — no juggling multiple vendors.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a service visit? Call us within 24 hours and we'll return to make it right at no additional cost.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every property is unique. Contact us for a custom proposal based on your property's size, needs, and goals — with no hidden fees or surprise charges.

guarantee.headline: Our Commitment to You
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll return to make it right at no additional cost. We stake our 16-year reputation on every single property we maintain.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Metro Atlanta and North Georgia including Buford, Duluth, Snellville, Sugar Hill, Alpharetta, Forsyth County, and Gwinnett County. Contact us to confirm coverage for your specific location.

faqs.question: Do you work with HOAs and property management companies?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. HOA and multi-family communities are our specialty. We understand board expectations, budget cycles, and the communication standards property managers require.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: After your property walk-through and proposal approval, most new accounts begin within 1-2 weeks. We'll coordinate timing that works best for your community or property.

faqs.question: Do you handle both maintenance and installations?
faqs.answer: Yes. We're your one-stop landscape partner. From weekly mowing and seasonal color to full hardscape installations and irrigation systems, everything is managed under one roof.

faqs.question: What makes NGLM different from other landscape companies?
faqs.answer: We invest heavily in training our crews, improving our systems, and building genuine partnerships with clients. You'll have consistent teams, proactive communication, and a company that treats your property like our reputation depends on it — because it does.

testimonials.name: Sean Nebel
testimonials.text: An exceptional business that is well managed and customer friendly. These guys really seem to care about the customer and the work they do. Not just a check.

testimonials.name: Michelle Anderson-Beatty
testimonials.text: NGLM takes care of our HOA contract. They do a fantastic job!!! Great service and great communication.

testimonials.name: Arnold Darsey
testimonials.text: After creating a design for the East side of my home/lot in Snellville, GA, Philip and his crew yesterday did a marvelous job in fulfilling our expectations.

contact.headline: Ready to Elevate Your Property?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free property assessment today and discover why HOAs and property managers across North Georgia trust NGLM.
benefits: Custom proposal within days, not weeks
No contracts required to get started
